tasks.title: Add Firebase Authentication dependencies and configuration
tasks.description:
Add Firebase Authentication to the project.

**Steps:**
1. Run `npm install firebase` to add Firebase SDK
2. Create `src/config/firebase.ts` with Firebase configuration (use environment variables for API keys)
3. Create `.env.example` with Firebase config variable names
4. Initialize Firebase Auth in the config file
5. Update `.gitignore` to exclude `.env` if not already present

**Do not commit actual API keys** - use placeholder values in .env.example.
acceptance_criteria: firebase package added to package.json
Firebase config file created with proper TypeScript types
.env.example created with Firebase variable names
Firebase Auth initialized and exported from config

tasks.title: Create authentication context with session management and persistence
tasks.description:
Build the authentication state management system using Firebase Auth.

**Context:**
- Review existing context pattern in `src/context/ProfileContext.jsx` and `src/context/ProjectsContext.jsx`
- Follow the same pattern for consistency

**Implementation:**
1. Create `src/context/AuthContext.jsx` (or .tsx if using TypeScript)
2. Implement authentication state:
   - currentUser (Firebase user object or null)
   - loading state
   - error state
   - isAuthenticated boolean
3. Implement methods:
   - `signInWithEmail(email, password)` with rate limiting after 3 failed attempts
   - `signInWithGoogle()` for social auth
   - `signOut()` for current device
   - `signOutAllDevices()` (revoke tokens)
   - `enableMFA()` / `disableMFA()` stubs for future MFA implementation
4. Configure Firebase session persistence to 30 days (use `setPersistence(browserLocalPersistence)`)
5. Log all authentication events (success, failure, logout) to console or Firebase Analytics
6. Create custom hook `useAuth()` to consume the context
7. Add error boundary for auth errors

**Security Requirements:**
- Implement progressive delay on failed login attempts (3s after 3rd attempt, 10s after 5th, etc.)
- Store failed attempt count in sessionStorage (resets on successful login)
- Never expose Firebase API keys in client code (use env variables)

**Testing:**
- Create `src/context/AuthContext.test.jsx`
- Test login success/failure flows
- Test rate limiting logic
- Test session persistence
- Test logout functionality
- Mock Firebase Auth methods using vitest mocks
acceptance_criteria: AuthContext created with all authentication methods
Session persists for 30 days using Firebase persistence
Failed login attempts trigger progressive delays after 3 attempts
All auth events logged
useAuth hook provides access to auth state and methods
Comprehensive tests written and passing locally

tasks.title: Build login page with email/password and social authentication UI
tasks.description:
Create the login UI component with authentication forms.

**Implementation:**
1. Create `src/pages/Login.jsx` (and `src/pages/Login.css`)
2. Build login form:
   - Email input with validation
   - Password input with show/hide toggle
   - "Remember me" checkbox (for 30-day persistence)
   - Submit button with loading state
   - Error message display
3. Add social authentication buttons:
   - "Sign in with Google" button
   - Future: GitHub, Microsoft (add placeholders)
4. Add link to password reset flow (stub for now)
5. Display progressive delay message when rate limited ("Too many attempts. Try again in X seconds")
6. Implement form validation:
   - Valid email format
   - Minimum password length (8 characters)
   - Show inline validation errors
7. On successful login, redirect to home page or intended destination
8. Style consistently with existing pages (review `src/pages/Profile.jsx`, `src/pages/Profile.css` for patterns)

**Routing:**
- Add `/login` route to `src/App.jsx`
- Add login link to navbar for unauthenticated users

**Testing:**
- Create `src/pages/Login.test.jsx`
- Test form validation
- Test email/password login flow
- Test social auth button clicks
- Test rate limiting UI display
- Test redirect on successful login
- Mock AuthContext and Firebase Auth
acceptance_criteria: Login page created with email/password form
Social authentication buttons present
Form validation working with helpful error messages
Progressive delay message shown when rate limited
Login route added to App.jsx
Responsive design matching existing pages
Comprehensive tests written and passing locally

tasks.title: Implement logout functionality and session management UI
tasks.description:
Add logout capabilities and session management interface.

**Implementation:**
1. Add logout button to navbar (when user is authenticated)
   - Modify `src/components/Navbar.jsx`
   - Show user avatar/email when logged in
   - Dropdown menu with "Logout" option
2. Create session management page `src/pages/Account.jsx` (optional, could be in profile):
   - Display current session info (device, login time, IP if available)
   - "Logout all devices" button
   - Last login timestamp
   - Optional: MFA settings section (placeholder for future)
3. Implement logout confirmation dialog (optional, for "logout all")
4. Clear local session data on logout
5. Redirect to home page after logout
6. Log logout events (single device vs all devices)

**Testing:**
- Update `src/components/Navbar.test.jsx` to test logout button
- Create `src/pages/Account.test.jsx` if account page created
- Test logout functionality
- Test "logout all devices" flow
- Test navbar shows correct state (logged in vs logged out)
- Mock AuthContext
acceptance_criteria: Logout button added to navbar for authenticated users
Logout clears session and redirects to home
"Logout all devices" functionality implemented
Logout events logged
Tests written and passing locally

tasks.title: Add protected routes and authentication guards
tasks.description:
Implement route protection to require authentication for certain pages.

**Implementation:**
1. Create `src/components/ProtectedRoute.jsx`
   - Wrapper component that checks authentication state
   - Redirects to `/login` if not authenticated
   - Stores intended destination for redirect after login
   - Shows loading state while checking auth
2. Wrap protected routes in `src/App.jsx`:
   - `/profile` should require authentication
   - `/projects` (if project creation requires auth)
   - Keep home, about, contact public
3. Handle auth state loading:
   - Show loading spinner while Firebase checks session
   - Prevent flash of login page if user is already authenticated
4. Implement redirect after login:
   - If user tried to access `/profile` while logged out, redirect there after login
   - Store intended URL in sessionStorage or route state

**Testing:**
- Create `src/components/ProtectedRoute.test.jsx`
- Test redirect to login when not authenticated
- Test rendering protected component when authenticated
- Test loading state
- Test redirect after successful login
- Mock AuthContext and React Router
acceptance_criteria: ProtectedRoute component created
Profile and relevant pages protected by auth
Unauthenticated users redirected to login
Redirect to intended page after login works
Loading state shown during auth check
Tests written and passing locally

tasks.title: Validate authentication feature tests
tasks.description:
Run the complete test suite for the authentication feature to ensure all functionality works correctly.

**Test files to validate:**
- src/context/AuthContext.test.jsx
- src/pages/Login.test.jsx
- src/pages/Account.test.jsx (if created)
- src/components/ProtectedRoute.test.jsx
- src/components/Navbar.test.jsx (updated tests)

**Validation steps:**
1. Run `npm test` to execute all tests
2. Verify all authentication tests pass
3. Check for any console errors or warnings
4. Verify test coverage for authentication code is reasonable (>80%)

**Success criteria:**
- All tests pass
- No TypeScript errors
- No console errors in test output
acceptance_criteria: All authentication tests pass
No TypeScript compilation errors
Test coverage adequate for authentication logic

tasks.title: Commit authentication feature implementation
tasks.description:
Create a git commit for the complete authentication and session management feature.

**Files to commit:**
- package.json (Firebase dependency)
- src/config/firebase.ts
- .env.example
- src/context/AuthContext.jsx and test file
- src/pages/Login.jsx, Login.css, and test file
- src/pages/Account.jsx (if created) and test file
- src/components/ProtectedRoute.jsx and test file
- src/components/Navbar.jsx (modified)
- src/App.jsx (modified for routes)
- Any other modified files

**Commit message:**
feat: Implement secure authentication with session management

- Add Firebase Authentication integration
- Create login with email/password and social auth options
- Implement 30-day session persistence on trusted devices
- Add logout from current or all devices
- Implement progressive delay on failed login attempts
- Add route protection for authenticated pages
- Log all authentication events for security audit

Closes EUN-75
acceptance_criteria: All authentication files committed
Commit message follows conventional commit format
References issue EUN-75
